# Session 9 timing workload: the full set 10 (land units) slice of
# the enumerated corpus, the largest single set. Friend identity
# only: full-frame icons will NOTE-degrade, which is fine for a
# throughput measurement. DO NOT COMMIT the GeneratedIcons.swift
# this produces; restore from sidcs-maritime.txt afterward.
